subject: What 2,000 families say about the food
preheader: Real reviews from real people who made the switch from the supermarket.
body:
We could tell you our food is better. But we'd rather let the families who eat it every week do the talking.

"My kids can taste the difference. And I love knowing the farmers are getting a fair price." - James, Northern Beaches

"Finally, a grocery delivery that actually cares about where the food comes from. The quality is incredible." - Sarah, Sydney

More than 2,000 families across Sydney now order through FarmThru. They collect from their nearest hub, and most of them never looked back.

Here's what they're getting: 100% grass-fed beef from Rachel's Farm. Heritage Berkshire pork from Bundarra Berkshires. Wild-caught salmon from Collins Wild Caught. Pasture-raised chicken. Eggs from Farmer Brown.

Every product is from a named farm. No hormones, no antibiotics, no feedlot finishing. Food that's 2-3 days old, not 14-21 days in cold storage.

The Brookvale hub is open Monday to Friday. If you haven't tried it yet, this week is a good week to start.

FarmThru
creative_brief: Social proof email. Feature the two testimonials prominently with quote styling. Product photos below (beef, salmon, pork). Single CTA button to the shop. Warm, confident tone. Let the customers sell it.
